identity: Tribal human male shaman (distinctly masculine jaw and build), dark-brown skin, long black braids beaded with bone and feather charms, sharp amber eyes, a red painted war-stripe across the eyes, strong wiry adult male build.
outfit: Tribal shaman attire — tan leather loincloth and belt, a layered fur-and-bone chest harness with bone charms and small painted wooden totems, rawhide arm-wraps, a feathered headband. Exposed muscular arms and chest with red and white ritual paint. Worn leather moccasins.
weapons: A tall gnarled wooden totem-staff topped with an animal skull (wolf or horned beast) wrapped in leather thongs and hanging feathers, held in the right hand.
attackStyle: East-facing. Staff thrust forward, a burst of blue spirit-energy and floating feathers erupting outward. CRITICAL: character must be MID-STRIKE, clearly in motion — weapon in the middle of a swing, thrust, shot, or spell-cast, NOT an idle/battle-ready stance. Pose must be visually distinct from the east idle.
spellStyle: East-facing. Staff raised high, free hand up, a swirling totem of blue spirit-light with an ancestral face forming above.
blockStyle: East-facing. Staff held diagonally, a translucent blue spirit-barrier forming from the staff-top outward.
koStyle: East-facing, slumped on one knee, staff fallen beside her, braids splayed, mantle disheveled.
southStyle: Facing camera (south), fierce tribal idle. Staff planted at her side, free hand raised in a gesture with blue spirit-light dancing on the fingertips.
portraitStyle: Bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view. Beaded black braids, red war-stripe across eyes, fur-mantle and bone necklaces visible.

referenceSheet.prompt:
IDENTITY (must match reference sheet exactly): Tribal human male shaman (distinctly masculine jaw and build), dark-brown skin, long black braids beaded with bone and feather charms, sharp amber eyes, a red painted war-stripe across the eyes, strong wiry adult male build.

OUTFIT: Tribal shaman attire — tan leather loincloth and belt, a layered fur-and-bone chest harness with bone charms and small painted wooden totems, rawhide arm-wraps, a feathered headband. Exposed muscular arms and chest with red and white ritual paint. Worn leather moccasins.

WEAPONS: A tall gnarled wooden totem-staff topped with an animal skull (wolf or horned beast) wrapped in leather thongs and hanging feathers, held in the right hand.

CLASS: humanoid. Full-body view, head to feet visible. Character occupies ~70% of the canvas height. Feet aligned near the bottom; headroom above.

POSE: full-body side profile facing right (east), calm combat-ready idle. Head up, eyes visible. NOT a portrait bust, NOT a close-up — entire character from head to feet.

STYLE: detailed pixel art with clean readable silhouette, warm pixel-art palette, transparent background, no ground shadow.

portrait.prompt:
IDENTITY (must match reference sheet exactly): Tribal human male shaman (distinctly masculine jaw and build), dark-brown skin, long black braids beaded with bone and feather charms, sharp amber eyes, a red painted war-stripe across the eyes, strong wiry adult male build.

OUTFIT: Tribal shaman attire — tan leather loincloth and belt, a layered fur-and-bone chest harness with bone charms and small painted wooden totems, rawhide arm-wraps, a feathered headband. Exposed muscular arms and chest with red and white ritual paint. Worn leather moccasins.

WEAPONS: A tall gnarled wooden totem-staff topped with an animal skull (wolf or horned beast) wrapped in leather thongs and hanging feathers, held in the right hand.

POSE (portrait): Bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view. Beaded black braids, red war-stripe across eyes, fur-mantle and bone necklaces visible.

FRAMING: bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view, centered in a 256x256 canvas, shoulders fill the lower third.

SCALE (non-negotiable): character must occupy approximately 180px of the 256px canvas height — roughly 70%. Do NOT stretch or upscale. Extra space above head and/or below feet is correct.

STYLE: pixel art, transparent background, no ground shadow, no borders, no text. Match the palette and style of the reference sheet.

NEGATIVE: do not add weapons or props not listed in WEAPONS. Do not change palette, species, or outfit from the reference sheet. Do not zoom in — respect SCALE.
